reasoning: Your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance, causing a significant drop in power over sustained efforts. In your last ride, you averaged 123.7W, indicating plenty of room for higher power training. This session focuses on strengthening your endurance and performance in the main Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 10-min over-unders: 2 min at 242-256W, 3 min at 201-218W, repeat twice per set

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
